hero.subtitle: The Peninsula Collection
hero.description: Curating extraordinary living experiences where architectural precision meets the unspoiled beauty of the Dominican north coast.

value_prop.subtitle: Our Philosophy
value_prop.description: We don’t just build properties; we curate ecosystems. Bigentik Group represents a shift towards intentional development, where every square inch is designed to harmonize with Samaná's tropical landscape.
value_prop.card_desc1: Construction quality is always top-notch and finished with the best materials.
value_prop.card_desc2: We always seek the best locations to implement our developments.
value_prop.card_desc3: We always apply for the CONFOTUR Certification (Law 158-01) which exempts first owners from property taxes for 15 years.
value_prop.card_desc4: We manage the rental and profitability of our clients' properties.
value_prop.float_desc: Unwavering standards in sustainable luxury and regional integration.

cards.title: Tax Incentives
cards.description: Take advantage of the CONFOTUR law, offering property tax exemptions for up to 15 years on qualified developments.

cards.title: High Rental Yield

cards.description: Property values in Samaná have seen a steady 15% annual increase as infrastructure continues to expand.

lifestyle.quote: "Bigentik is not just building homes; they are building the future of Samaná's lifestyle, where luxury meets silence and nature."

hero.subtitle: Our Heritage
hero.description: Bigentik Group represents a lineage of architectural excellence and strategic investment, curated for the world's most discerning individuals.

cards.title: Architectural Integrity
cards.description: We believe space should be an extension of character. Every structural element is selected to harmonize with its natural environment, bringing uncompromising comfort.

cards.title: Sustainable Legacy
cards.description: Our projects are built for generations. By integrating advanced sustainable technologies with timeless materials, we ensure lasting value and environmental respect.

cards.title: Discreet Excellence
cards.description: Luxury feels best when subtle. Our services and developments prioritize privacy, security, and a seamless operational experience.

presence.portal_desc: Secure access to exclusive project data and real-time performance metrics for our global partners.

features: Paredes de cristal de piso a techo

location_map.title: Strategic Location
location_map.desc: Perfectly positioned away from urban noise, yet only 15 minutes from the central business district and international airport.

overview.pullQuote: An architectural dialogue between the untouched Mediterranean landscape and the precision of contemporary minimalist design.
paragraphs: Ubicado en el corazón del valle recuperado, The Olive Grove Estates representa el proyecto residencial más ambicioso de Bigentik Group hasta la fecha. Cada estructura está orientada para maximizar la luz natural manteniendo la eficiencia térmica de la construcción tradicional basada en la tierra.
La paleta es un reflejo directo del entorno circundante, incorporando piedra caliza pulida con chorro de arena, roble envejecido y nuestros exclusivos acabados de bronce en tonos oliva.

footer.description: Curating the world's most prestigious real estate and investment opportunities since 2008.
